chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-787 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case (Priority) 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For orders on CMA 3613/2020 3.For hearing of CMA 3614/2020 4.For hearing of main case. 06-12-2023 Syed Tanveer Abbas Shah, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G. ***** Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate has filed power on behalf of respondents No.1 to 3. Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press this petition, as the grievance of the petitioner has been redressed. Accordingly, this petition along with listed applications is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
